_meta.title: retrospective control cleanliness audit v1 (disclosure only)
_meta.authority: D106 SS3; procedure docs/CONTROL_CRITERIA_v3.md SS4 (freeze-committed 1ce4cb8 before this run; SS4 correction record 2026-07-21 applied pre-run)
_meta.population: 62 controls: wave-1 C01-C08 (8), wave-1 v2-controls V01-V22 (22), wave-2 W01-W23 (23), holdout hc 9
_meta.window_operationalization: W start = matched treatment manipulation_period_start, else cutoff-36mo (per set convention in the offline pass); W end = cutoff+24mo (v3 SS4, fixed pre-run); per-control values in each record's 'window'.

sources.a: sealed AAER respondents index snapshot, fetched_at 2026-07-06T08:46:46Z (offline pass); 7 fuzzy token hits manually disambiguated as generic-token collisions
sources.b_c_e_screen: sealed EDGAR submissions metadata (offline pass, deterministic items/form screens)
sources.d: EDGAR full-text search https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST/search-index (q="material weakness", forms 10-K then 10-Q, per-CIK, window-restricted; up to 3 hit documents context-checked per control; supplemental phrase query q="identified a material weakness" forms 10-K,10-Q as cap-overflow safety net; follow-up documents as cited in notes). FTS covers 2001+; all 62 windows start 2008+, so no pre-FTS INCOMPLETE.
sources.f: https://securities.stanford.edu/fullsearch.html?q={ticker|company|former names} + filings-case.html pages (access 2026-07-21); class periods verified from the registrants' own EDGAR litigation disclosures where intersection was decision-relevant. Note: filings.html?ticker= column filter is login-gated; fullsearch used instead. SCAC banner: site under restructuring, 'updates and new filings will not be available' until Winter 2026 -- coverage of very recent filings may lag (affects hc controls, which are provisional regardless).

_meta.boundaries: Disclosure only -- no published FPR recomputed, no control reclassified or removed, no frozen artifact touched (D106 common OUT).
